user.title: Base Power
user.description: Enter the email address for your Base Power account. We'll ask Base to email you a 6-digit sign-in code.

code.title: Check your email
code.description: Base Power just emailed a 6-digit sign-in code to {email}. Enter it here.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Base Power
reauth_confirm.description: Your Base Power session has expired. We've emailed a new 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it here.

error.invalid_auth: That email wasn't accepted by Base Power. Double-check it matches your Base account.
error.invalid_code: The code didn't verify. Check the email, try the latest code, or restart the flow to get a new one.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Base Power. Check your internet connection.
error.no_locations: No service locations found on your account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Base Power account is already configured.

data.poll_interval_outage: Poll interval during a grid outage (seconds)
